notes: Phase 2 Milestone C5 PR-1 ✅ shipped via PR #176 (squash 96e3bbd) on 2026-05-31T15:17:22Z. Tasks 0036 (implementer) + 0037 (verifier) as SINGLE-PASS CLOSURE (full-ship-cycle directive — same session implemented + verified + merged). cmd/orun gained the catalog CLI: catalog.go (orun catalog root + subcommand index; §11 JSON envelope writer apiVersion/kind/data + always-present warnings; the single shared parseCatalogSelector → catalogstore.RefSelector bridge for current|main|latest|branches/<name>|prs/<n>|cat-<key> pin, malformed → exit 1), catalog_refresh.go (the write path: sourcectx resolve → catalogresolve.BuildCatalog → catalogstore.AssembleBundle → WriteSourceSnapshot/WriteCatalogSnapshot/WriteGlobalIndexes/WriteRefs; idempotent reuse created=false/reused=true exit 0; dirty-worktree banner + local-only snapshot; authoritative on clean main/protected else preview; §2 exit codes 0/1/2/3; --sync no-op), catalog_refs.go (enumeration via catalogstore.ListRefs; empty→exit 0; --json CatalogRefsResult), main.go (exit-code plumbing via errors.As on interface{ ExitCode() int }). TWO NEW PURE SEAMS in internal/catalogstore preserving the architecture rule (catalogstore depends on catalogresolve, NEVER reverse; both no-raw-FS): bundle.go AssembleBundle (CatalogView → CatalogGraphs/CatalogLocalIndexes/GlobalIndexUpdate/RefUpdate; no I/O, deterministic, golden-tested — lives in catalogstore because it returns catalogstore types and catalogresolve may not import catalogstore) and listrefs.go ListRefs (refs/sources/* ⋈ refs/catalogs/* join via statestore.List/Read, name-sorted). Verifier PASS, NO fixes required: catalogstore coverage held at 90.2% floor; cmd/orun package coverage 24.1% (long-standing baseline, no enforced floor) — new seams + refresh→refs E2E covered. Static guards: go build/vet, go test -race -count=1 (4 pkgs), make verify-generated, no-raw-FS grep all clean; 7-scenario manual smoke green. PR CI green on HEAD 88e104d (run 26716370631). Carry-forward to C5 PR-2: CatalogLocalIndexes emits component-exec indexes only (empty executions[]); owner/system/domain/type axes deferred (data-model §9 under-specifies; history events are C7). Reports: ai/reports/task-0036-implementer.md + ai/reports/task-0037-verifier.md.

Phase 2 Milestone C4 ✅ CLOSED via PR #175 (squash 42eace5) on 2026-05-31T12:51:14Z. Tasks 0034 (implementer) + 0035 (verifier with attached coverage fix). C4 PR-3 shipped the entire read side of internal/catalogstore: resolver.go with all 5 Resolver methods (ResolveCurrentSource/ResolveSource/ResolveCatalog/ResolveComponent/ResolveComponentLatest) implementing the catalog-store.md §4 refs-first→walk-fallback→typed-sentinel ladder (current→latest→main; ErrComponentNotFound vs ErrCatalogNotFound; errors.Is chains; ctx cancellation; non-NotFound read errors surfaced not swallowed), plus rebuild.go RebuildIndexes (added to Resolver interface) reconstructing local+global indexes from authoritative manifests deterministically, with a T-STORE-3 scrub-then-rebuild byte-identity test across all 3 index kinds. Zero live ErrNotImplemented Resolver surfaces. No production code changed. Adjacent floors held. Verifier report: ai/reports/task-0035-verifier.md.
